subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, bringing the utmost joy and delight. It heralded the completion of the task [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید نهایت روح و ریحان حاصل گردید بشارت اتمام کار
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
